chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P.No. D- 465 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case 1.For orders on office objections 2.For orders on CMA 1993/2023 3.For hearing of main case 02-05-2023 Mr. Muhammad Raza Soomro, Advocate for the petitioner. ***** Through instant petition, the petitioner seeks inviting of comments from the respondents regarding plotting and housing schemes of Taluka Faiz Ganj and if any scheme is declared by the respondents as unapproved then strict action may be taken. It appears that in memo of petition, neither any specific housing scheme has been referred to nor any documentary evidence i.e. brochure or announcement of housing scheme has been annexed with the petition, so much so, the petitioner, at the first instance, has not admittedly approached the Sindh Building Control Authority for the redressal of his grievances. Hence, this petition being vague in nature and without any supporting material stands dismissed in limine along with listed application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
